release_notes: v0.3.9 (BP083): Starter Chocolate Pack (280 verified eblets pre-seeded on install — eliminates first-Plow failure on fresh installs), MEMORY.md injection robustness cure (mkdirSync fix + fallback identity + Self-Context badge in Lean Ask), Plow questions-per-domain cap raised to 200 + stale-closure fix via useRef, Mesh Comparison free-form input (max 379/domain) + quick-pick buttons + stale-closure fix. Pinned Proofs: 68/70 MMLU-Pro 97.1% canonical receipt added to mnemosynec.ai/proofs/. (Note: v0.3.7 yoke work — v0.3.8 was an intermediate GPQA Diamond commit.)
